## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Validation

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Manual iOS run tested

## Screenshots (if UI changed)

Attach before/after images or recordings.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style and lints
- [ ] Documentation updated (README/docs/changelog)
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
